title: Takedown Appeal Record
description: A record used to formally process and track appeals to moderation takedowns.

appeal_id.description: Unique identifier for this takedown appeal.

takedown_record_id.description: Reference to the original takedown record being appealed.

appellant_id.description: Identifier of the user or entity filing the appeal.

reasoning.description: Text reasoning explaining why the takedown should be overturned.

evidence_links.description: Optional array of links providing evidence to support the appeal.
